name: Lamb Ring Filled with Creamy Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop tomatoes into small pieces. Mix together tomatoes and all juices with lamb, bread crumbs, onion, egg, 1 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, and thyme in a medium bowl. Mix well. Place the mixture in a 1 1/2-2 quart ring mold. Make an indentation along the inside and outside rims of the mold to allow for cooking juices. Place on jelly roll pan. Bake in a 350°F oven for 1 hour.
2. Meanwhile, make spinach filling. Thoroughly blend all remaining ingredients except ketchup in an ovenproof dish. After the lamb mold has baked for 30 minutes, begin baking the filling for 30 minutes.
3. Remove lamb mold from the oven. Drain excess juices and invert onto a serving platter. Spoon creamy spinach filling into the center. Heat ketchup and spoon over lamb ring.
